title: The Regal Mutt - Vegetable Dog Chews - Mixed Shape Variety Pack - Large - 1kg Bag
features: DAILY DENTAL TREAT FOR DOGS – Daily dental dog treats for larger sized dogs that help remove plaque and prevent tartar. Helps to freshen bad breath.

SATISFYING TEXTURE & TASTE – Our tasty vegetable based chews are hypoallergenic and provide a healthy and satisfying chew for your dog. An ideal dental aid that will help to keep your dogs teeth and gums in a good condition.
HEALTHY DOG CHEW - Our chews are low in fat, sugar free and 100% vegetable based. The chews are free from artificial colours and flavours.
IDEAL FOR DOGS THAT LOVE A CHEW – Our delicious treats will help keep your dog busy, ensuring that chair legs and new shoes have a well earned break.
VALUE BAG – Our 1 kg bags provide excellent value for money.
SUPPORTING DOG RESCUE CHARITIES – Over £40,000 raised for dog rescue charities !
description: Product Description £40,000 Raised for Dog Rescue Charities About Us - The Regal Mutt is a bit different to most other companies. Not only do we sell quality products, but we have also made a difference by donating over £40,000 to dog rescue charities. Charity Donation - The donations made by our company have supported dog rescue charities to carry out their amazing work, that is rescuing and taking care of dogs that need their help. The costs of running a dog rescue charity quickly add up, for example, kennels, vets fees, food, etc.. and so every penny helps. Quality Products - We have provided our customers with quality products, while supporting charities that have made a difference. Unlike many other companies our business model has taken an ethical approach, with the aim of growing the business steadily while supporting our four legged friends. The Regal Mutt - Mixed Shape Vegetable Dog Chews - Large - 1kg Bag Description: These Vegetable Dog Chews are made using 100% vegetable goodness, with a chewy texture that will make them sure to become one of your dog's favourite treats. Chewing these on a daily basis helps to remove plaque, prevents the build up of tartar, freshens breath and generally helps keep your dogs’ teeth and gums in good condition. The chews are low in fat, sugar free, hypoallergenic and contain no artificial colours or flavours. The chews are packed in a re-sealable bag, and will keep your dog busy, ensuring that chair legs and new shoes have a well earned break !! Our 1kg bags provide great value for money !! Ingredients: Sweet Potato Flour, Pea Starch, Vegetable Glycerin, Calcium Carbonate, Dried Brewers Yeast, Dried Peppermint, Cranberry Powder, Peanut Butter, Powdered Cellulose, Vegetable Oil, Sodium Pyrophosphate, Malt Extract. Quantity & Weight: Approximately 1kg of large vegetable toothbrush chews; four separate shapes – approximate weight 55g per chew.
